description: Clock Goto block - sends clock/event signals to a CLKFROM block via tag
name: CLKGOTO
anomalies: exprs has 2 rows - tag and tag visibility scope
Tag value 'A' is duplicated in exprs AND objectsParameters
integerParameters=1 maps to the visibility scope setting
Control port has initialState=0.0 (standard for control ports)
criticalRules: First exprs value is the tag name (must match CLKFROM)
Second exprs value is tag visibility scope (1=local, 2=scoped, 3=global)
integerParameters mirrors the visibility scope setting
Can connect to multiple CLKFROM blocks with same tag
Use CLKGotoTagVisibility to control tag scope explicitly
commonUses: Sending event signals across long distances in diagram
Event signal distribution from central source
Connecting event signals across subsystem boundaries
